Home.title: Luxury Yachting Redefined
Home.subtitle: Premium yacht maintenance in Miami
Home.inviteText: Experience the ultimate care for your yacht. Our team is dedicated to providing premium washing, detailing, and protection services that ensure your vessel maintains its flawless appearance.

Footer.slogan: Experts in comprehensive yacht care: premium washing, teak treatment, metal polishing, and engine room maintenance. We ensure an impeccable finish and long-lasting protection for your vessel.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 Prestige Yachts Detailing. All rights reserved.

About.title: Welcome to Prestige Yacht Detailing
About.p1: At Prestige Yacht Detailing, we are setting a new standard for yacht care in Miami. We are a passionate team in the maritime industry, bringing fresh energy, unwavering dedication, and an obsessive attention to detail to every service.
About.p2: Our mission is simple yet ambitious: to preserve the pristine condition of your vessel. We specialize in comprehensive care—from deep cleaning and teak treatments to metal polishing and engine room maintenance—ensuring your yacht always looks its absolute best.
About.quote: Your satisfaction isn't just our goal—it's our promise.
